# Market Disrupt
> Zendesk Premier Partner, HubSpot Platinum Solutions Partner, and Webflow Certified Partner based in Texas. Founded in 2015, Market Disrupt is a senior-led technology consulting firm specializing in Zendesk, HubSpot, and Webflow implementation, optimization, and integration for growth-stage companies.

Market Disrupt helps organizations maximize ROI on their existing software investments through customer service architecture, CRM automation, website development, and systems integration. Known for a 4.9-star client rating and senior-led delivery, Market Disrupt serves technology, fitness, healthcare, legal, automotive, and professional services industries.

> Full details: [llms-full.txt](https://market-disrupt.github.io/llms.txt/llms-full.txt)

## Pages
- [Home](https://market-disrupt.github.io/llms.txt/pages/index.md): What Market Disrupt does, partner status, and core services overview.
- [About](https://market-disrupt.github.io/llms.txt/pages/about.md): Company history, team, certifications, and differentiators.
- [Contact](https://market-disrupt.github.io/llms.txt/pages/contact.md): How to reach Market Disrupt.
- [FAQ](https://market-disrupt.github.io/llms.txt/pages/faq.md): Common questions about services, process, and engagements.
- [Blog](https://market-disrupt.github.io/llms.txt/pages/blog.md): Articles on Zendesk, HubSpot, Webflow, and CRM strategy.

## Services
- [Zendesk Services](https://market-disrupt.github.io/llms.txt/pages/zendesk.md): Full-service Zendesk implementation, AI configuration, automation, migrations, and management.
- [HubSpot Services](https://market-disrupt.github.io/llms.txt/pages/hubspot.md): HubSpot CRM buildouts, Sales/Marketing/Service Hub, automation, and reporting.
- [Webflow Services](https://market-disrupt.github.io/llms.txt/pages/webflow.md): Strategy, design, development, and ongoing management for Webflow websites.
- [CRM Workflow Architecture](https://market-disrupt.github.io/llms.txt/pages/crm-workflow-architecture.md): Automation frameworks, governance rules, and workflow standards.
- [Sales Pipeline Architecture](https://market-disrupt.github.io/llms.txt/pages/sales-pipeline-architecture-design.md): Pipeline design, deal stages, and revenue operations infrastructure.
- [Contact Lifecycle Design](https://market-disrupt.github.io/llms.txt/pages/contact-lifecycle-design.md): Lifecycle stages, lead status frameworks, and automation rules.
- [Nurture Sequencing Deployment](https://market-disrupt.github.io/llms.txt/pages/nurture-sequencing-deployment.md): Email nurture flows, segmentation, and lead follow-up automation.
- [Customer Service Workflow](https://market-disrupt.github.io/llms.txt/pages/customer-service-workflow.md): Ticket routing, SLA automation, and support workflow design.
- [Omnichannel Experience](https://market-disrupt.github.io/llms.txt/pages/omnichannel-experience.md): Unified support across email, chat, phone, and social.
- [Telephony & IVR Routing](https://market-disrupt.github.io/llms.txt/pages/telephony-ivr-routing.md): Call flows, queue logic, and intelligent routing.
- [External Help Center & Self-Service](https://market-disrupt.github.io/llms.txt/pages/external-help-center-self-service.md): Knowledge base structure and ticket deflection.
- [Customer Data Strategy](https://market-disrupt.github.io/llms.txt/pages/customer-data-strategy.md): Data models, lifecycle structure, and governance.
- [Integrations & Migrations](https://market-disrupt.github.io/llms.txt/pages/integrations-migrations.md): Platform migrations and system integrations.
- [Data Integrity and Cleansing](https://market-disrupt.github.io/llms.txt/pages/data-integrity-and-cleansing.md): CRM deduplication, standardization, and data quality.
- [Zendesk & HubSpot Integration](https://market-disrupt.github.io/llms.txt/pages/zendesk-hubspot-integration.md): Connecting Zendesk and HubSpot to unify support and sales data.
- [Internal Service Desk Systems](https://market-disrupt.github.io/llms.txt/pages/internal-service-desk-systems.md): IT support ticketing, routing, and SLAs.
- [Employee Knowledge & Enablement](https://market-disrupt.github.io/llms.txt/pages/employee-knowledge-enablement.md): Internal knowledge bases and enablement workflows.
- [IT Asset Management](https://market-disrupt.github.io/llms.txt/pages/it-asset-management-system-development.md): ITAM data models, workflows, and reporting.
- [Website Design & Development](https://market-disrupt.github.io/llms.txt/pages/website-design-development.md): High-performing Webflow websites built to convert.

## Industries
- [Technology](https://market-disrupt.github.io/llms.txt/pages/tech-industry.md): CRM automation and Zendesk workflows for SaaS and tech teams.
- [Fitness](https://market-disrupt.github.io/llms.txt/pages/fitness-industry.md): CRM setup and conversion-focused websites for fitness businesses.
- [Legal](https://market-disrupt.github.io/llms.txt/pages/legal-industry.md): Intake automations and pipeline tracking for law firms.
- [Healthcare/Medical](https://market-disrupt.github.io/llms.txt/pages/medical-industry.md): CRM and CX systems for faster intake and follow-up.
- [Automotive](https://market-disrupt.github.io/llms.txt/pages/automotive-industry.md): Lead capture and follow-up automation for dealers and auto shops.

## Platform Comparisons
- [Zendesk vs. Freshdesk](https://market-disrupt.github.io/llms.txt/pages/zendesk-vs-freshdesk.md): Feature comparison with recommendation guide.
- [Zendesk vs. Intercom](https://market-disrupt.github.io/llms.txt/pages/zendesk-vs-intercom.md): Comparison covering ticketing, messaging, AI tools, and use cases.
- [HubSpot vs. Salesforce](https://market-disrupt.github.io/llms.txt/pages/hubspot-vs-salesforce.md): Side-by-side comparison for SMBs and enterprise buyers.
- [HubSpot vs. Pipedrive](https://market-disrupt.github.io/llms.txt/pages/hubspot-vs-pipedrive.md): Comparison for growing sales teams.

- [About](https://market-disrupt.github.io/llms.txt/pages/about.md): Founded 2015. Senior-led consulting focused on platform optimization.
